feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Deleted
entry.content: Deleted

entry.title: Issue with BDT Enhancement for custom fields in BUT000 in BP Tcode
entry.content:
The requirement is to add two new custom fields in BP Transaction in a new tab. We have followed BDT approach, and all the customizations are done accordingly as per below blog:-

SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement - SAP Community

The custom tab along with fields are now visible and are editable in Change/Create mode as well.

However, when we are trying to change the value in these two custom fields during change/create process in BP Tcode, the data is not getting saved at both the BP screen level and the table level (BUT000).

Step 1:

Open a BP in BP Tcode and check Additional Data tab.

 

Fields are blank currently.

2- Go to Change mode and enter some values:

 

3- After pressing save, these values are not getting saved in BUT000 table:

My PAI Code:

FUNCTION zmdg_bup01_pai.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*
DATA: false TYPE boole-boole VALUE ' ',

lt_but000 TYPE TABLE OF but000,

table_name_but000 TYPE fsbp_table_name VALUE 'BUT000'.

 

FIELD-SYMBOLS: <but000> LIKE LINE OF lt_but000.

 

CHECK cvi_bdt_adapter=>is_direct_input_active( ) = false.

* step 1: update xo memory from technical screen structure

cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp_data(

EXPORTING

i_table_name = table_name_but000

IMPORTING

e_data_table = lt_but000[]

).

 

IF lt_but000[] IS INITIAL.

IF gs_but000 IS NOT INITIAL.

gs_but000-partner = cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp( ).

APPEND gs_but000 TO lt_but000.

ENDIF.

ELSE.

READ TABLE lt_but000 ASSIGNING <but000> INDEX 1.

<but000>-zownership = gs_but000-zownership.
<but000>-zclass = gs_but000-zclass.

ENDIF.

 

cvi_bdt_adapter=>data_pai(

i_table_name = table_name_but000

i_data_new = lt_but000[]

i_validate = false

).

* step 2: check fields

CHECK cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_activity( ) <> cvi_bdt_adapter=>activity_display.

ENDFUNCTION.

entry.title: Express Error During Insert into EINA – Key
entry.content:
Hello,

Some users have encountered the following express error: "Error during insert EINA with key 5300047395"

Initially, I investigated the most common cause—number range inconsistencies—but I verified that the number ranges in our system are correctly maintained.
I have also checked some Notes: 1955849 and 1906905 but there are already implemented in our system.

What could caused that and how can i resolve it?

entry.title: post array using ODataV4 / V2
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

 

I have this JSON Post in Odata 

{
"brand" : "ShopRite",
"fundingType" : 10,
"offerCode" : "25041101",
"gs1CoPrefix" : "",
"familyCode" : "0",
"offerSeries" : "1",
"manufacturerCodes" : [ "text", "text2" ],
"taxesReclaimable" : false,
"isTender" : false
}

manufacturerCodes is the array expected by the client.

How can we configure and implement a system to handle arrays in SEGW for OData? I know there are complex types or Collection types in V4, but those require a property (the sub-object has a field label like)  

"manufacturerCodes" : [  code: "text",

                                        code "text2" ]

or 

"manufacturerCodes" : [ { code: "text", }

                                       { code: "text2"  }

                                  ],

Any idea? Is there any standard approach to post a field with an array to SAP OData?

If we post, I'm having this error: "error while parsing an XML stream". Already tried using a collection or complex type.

 

Please
Thanks a lot for your time to help

entry.title: RAP event trigger via SAP GUI tcode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on to consume RAP event from sales order creation. As per requirement, standard event should trigger from sales order creation via EML, Sales order app and SAP GUI related tcode(VA01) as well.

As far as I know RAP event doesn't trigger from SAP GUI tcode. Can anyone help here if there is any way to trigger standard rap event from SAP GUI tcode VA01 ?

Thanks.

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: "IS ASSIGNED" doesn't work after dynamic ASSIGN (in a loop)
entry.content:
I have the below piece of code, I expect that the field symbol is not assigned for the component ATRIBUT (the component doesn't exist), but it says it's assigned, with the value of the previous component ID:

REPORT zdemo.
CLASS ltc_is_assigned_wrong_usage DEFINITION FINAL
  FOR TESTING RISK LEVEL HARMLESS DURATION SHORT.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    METHODS test FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ltc_is_assigned_wrong_usage IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD test.
    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_object,
        id        TYPE c LENGTH 10,
        attribute TYPE c LENGTH 10,
      END OF ty_object.
    DATA(object) = VALUE ty_object( id        = 'Value-ID'
                                    attribute = 'Value-Attr' ).
    DATA(component_names) = VALUE string_table( ( `WRONG` ) ( `ID` ) ( `ATRIBUT` ) ( `ATTRIBUTE` ) ).
    DATA(result) = VALUE string( ).
    LOOP AT component_names INTO DATA(component_name).
      ASSIGN COMPONENT component_name OF STRUCTURE object TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<component>).
      IF <component> IS ASSIGNED. "<===== doesn't work well ???
        result = result && |{ component_name } value: { <component> }\n|.
      ELSE.
        result = result && |{ component_name } not assigned\n|.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( 
          act = result
          exp = |WRONG not assigned\n|
             && |ID value: Value-ID\n|
             && |ATRIBUT value: Value-ID\n| "<==== I expect ATRIBUT not assigned
             && |ATTRIBUTE value: Value-Attr\n| ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Why does "IS ASSIGNED" return true for the non-existing component name ATRIBUT?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How to filter column values by description if description concatenated to ID
entry.content:
Hello, community

I created RAP application where I have column product which described in projection view as 

      @EndUserText.label: 'Sales org.'
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'SalesOrgDescription' ]
      _SalesOrg.SalesOrgExtId,

And filtering by ext. ID works perfectly, but if I want to filter by description it is not working because column is ID 🙂
Does somebody have idea how to make a work around, should I change text element to SalesOrgExtId? Maybe you have other ideas I'll be appreciated any

entry.title: CDS view entity : how to use domain value in WHERE clause
entry.content:
Hello,

A value of an ABAP domain can be used in the WHERE of the ancient CDS view.

For example in the CDS view I_PurchaseOrderItemPurgIssue, the value 'F' of domain BSTYP is used : view I_PurchaseOrderItemPurgIssue is not a view entity

But it is no more allowed if the CDS view is defined as view entity : View ZTEST_EKKO is defined as view entity

 

 

How can we test a domain value if the view is of type view entity ?

My SAP version is : ABAP 7.56 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

 

 

Chaouki

entry.title: Class FI_TAX_SERVICES causes error RW033 after upgrade
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In my code before calling FM BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST I call method calculate in class FI_TAX_SERVICES .

It works fine in SP27.

We upgraded to SP29. When running the code with the same file  

In SP27 a document is created but in SP29 error RW033 (Accounting Interface: Balance in Transaction Currency                   170.00- )  is displayed.

I see that methods CALCULATE1 and CALCULATE2 were added to the class, and the code is changed.

In the debug I can see that in SP27 AMT_DOCCUR has the original values (1000, -1000) and therefore the balance is 0.  But in SP29 AMT_DOCCUR in row 2 was changed to 1170 and therefore the balance is 170 (-1000, 1170).

Why does the method change 1000 to 1170?

In SP27

In method calculate  of class  FI_TAX_SERVICES:

In SP29

In method calculate1 (which is called from method CALCULATE) of class FI_TAX_SERVICES:

In SP29: When calling the method I tried to add the parameter DIFFERENCE_IS_TAX  = 'X' , but it did not help.

Do I need to add another parameter?

Is there something else that I should do?

Thank you in advanced

Hagit

entry.title: SAP CAPM Development - Calling New Page from Action button
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating a CAP Project using List Report with Object Page. I have 3 entities, the parent entity, child entity and another entity associate to the child. On the object page, is it possible that via action button, we will call another page or popup to maintain entity 3 (associated entity of child entity)? In the page map, I could not find the option to create a new page either.

entry.title: API Integration consume API passing attachment as http link for the 3rd party user to download
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I am working on api integration for Purchase Requisition between SAP and PROCOL. We have to consume the API shared by the client to transfer the data between SAP and PROCOL. We are doing this integration through PIPO. PIPO Consultant has created interface which we have used it in our abap program.

There is only one point which I could not able to achieve. The PR would be having attachments which I have to send it to PROCOL as http link as shown below in a variable of the nested structure shared by PROCOL.

Is it possible that the image attachment which was associated with the PR would be shared as http link by passing into the structure?

entry.title: Create custom entity with compositions exposed as OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question which I am not able to solve by myself ^^

My requirement basically is to create a new custom API in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud that allows me, for a given {warehouse + batch-managed product + quantity}, to find the list of all batch numbers, that can be consumed to address that batch-managed product's quantity based on some rules.

I gave myself as objective to create this structure as output of my new custom API, with a header structure (giving the status of the batch determination logic) and an item list (giving the list of all the batch numbers that should be used for the consumption, with the quantity to be consumed in each batch):

I started by created 2 custom CDS entities: one for the header structure and another one for the item structure.

I added this annotation to both these 2 custom CDS entities "@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" where "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" is a custom class referencing interface "IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER" In order to be able to trigger its method "SELECT" when someone tries to retrieve data from either one of my 2 custom CDS entities. 

In order to have a parent-child relationship between my 2 custom CDS entities, I added a composition statement in the header custom entity CDS view and an association to parent statement in the line-items child custom entity CDS view.

Custom Entity for the Header parent CDS view:

Custom Entity for the Line-Item Child CDS view:

Then I implemented code for the SELECT statement of my custom class ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1.

Once done, I created a new service definition exposing both my 2 custom cds entities:

Then I exposed my service definition into an OData V4 API service binding, followed with the normal communication scenario, comm arrangement configuration..

My problem is that, once all this is done, when I try to execute my API from POSTMAN, I am not able to get the header AND the item data AT THE SAME TIME.

I am able for instance to get data for the header custom entity CDS view with the correct structure I defined: 

I am also able to get data for the line_item custom entity CDS view, for the different batch numbers to use for the consumption as per the structure I designed:

But, How can I merge these two results of these 2 entities in the same response?

I want my custom API response to be similar to the following one: 

How can I accomplish this please?

I thought by creating a composition relationship between these 2 custom entities, that the SELECT method will fetch data for both header and Item custom entity CDS views and that the result will be merged in the same response, but it is not.

Also, when I run a GET OData call to the header entity, "SELECT" method of class "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET0" is called only once, and "io_request->get_entity_id( )" gives "ZC_TEST_BATCH_DETERMIN_HD" as entity. This means, that my logic is being executed ONLY on the header custom CDS view, which is not enough to fulfill my requirement.

Then I tried to add "$expand" to the OData URL to execute, by adding "?$expand=_BatchDetItemDetails" to my URL:

but I am getting HTTP Bad Request error in POSTMAN : "

"The expand option's expand path contains an invalid property '_BatchDetItemDetails'",

Can someone help me on this please? I feel like my custom API is not designed to "accept" any "expand" attribute. 

Or if you have another idea on how to achieve this, without having to use the "?$expand" statement?

Thanks experts

entry.title: How do I copy the view of the display organization/person in the transaction BP for my own report?
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

for my current project I need to use the detail view of business partners for my own report. The customer basically wants the person/organization display with all of the tabs in a pop up after a certain event and I can't seem to find the solution to this problem. In the following screenshots underneath the red line you can see the view I need exactly. Any help would be appreciated! 

 

 

Many thanks in advance! 

Kind Regards,

Desi

entry.title: BAPI to read table CRMS4D_EXT_REF in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am storing external reference of Service Contract in table CRMS4D_EXT_REF in field in SAP S/4 HANA. I need to read corresponding SAP service contract number in ABAP report.

If I pass external reference to field REFERENCE_NUMBER of table  CRMS4D_EXT_REF ,  field OBJECT_ID can give me SAP service contract number. Is there any BAPI or way to read the table contents in ABAP report. I don't want to use select query.

Thanks in advance,

Gayatri

entry.title: XNAB enhancement
entry.content:
How can we do enhancement in XNAB to split the records as per custom logic as per below. This is in the international version (99). We only need to do enhancement no configuration possible due to client setup. We have only one Valuation rule and need to split as below using BADI or any enhancement.

        Full Pay for the first 15 days – Valuation rule 01 

        Half pay for the next 20 days – Valuation rule 05 

        No pay after 35 days – Valuation rule 04

entry.title: Unable to delete Application Job Catalog on ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I ran an ABAP class for creating an application job catalog.

Unfortunetly, the transport request number was wrong, so the creation failed.

I tried to put the right transport request number, but the creation of the application job catalog fail with the error :

Creation of job catalog entry failed: Object ZMY_OBJECT (type job catalog entry) already exists.

However, there is no job catalog under the Application Job Catalog Entries folder, neither in the IAM Apps folder.

Is there a way to do a clean delete of the catalog ? Or do I have to create a new catalog with a new name ?

Thanks in advance,

Rémy

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

Please support

Best regards,Antony Pantoja

entry.title: SAP ABAP installation Error
entry.content:
Hello,

i am facing this error while trying to install SAP ABAP 7.52

**************************************************

Abort execution because of
Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException

***************************************************

i searched for long time and tried many solution but i couldn't solve it

can any one help me please?
the log file of installation :
***************************************************

To install this TestDrive you have to accept
the SAP COMMUNITY DEVELOPER License (DEV).
Do you agree to the above license terms? yes/no:
User's response to the accept license prompt = 'y'
Please enter a password:
Please re-enter password for verification:
extracting data archives...
extracting /home/vhcalnplci/sapsetup/server/TAR/x86_64/sapmnt.tgz-*
Checking Linux kernel memory management parameters according to SAP Note 941735
Backing up /etc/sysctl.conf in /etc/sysctl.backup
Checking Linux kernel parameter vm.max_map_count according to SAP Note 900929
Checking presence of new SYBASE license files
Replaced the license file /sybase/NPL/SYSAM-2_0/licenses/SYBASE_ASE_TestDrive.lic
Install service
Check Installation Path ...

saphostexec is already running (pid=3844). Stopping...Stopped
ok
Copy Executable ...
ok
Generate Profile ...
ok
Install SYS-V service ...
ok
-> Start /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostexec pf=/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile <-
start hostcontrol using profile /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile
ok
[OK] SAPHostExec / SAPHostControl succesfully installed
Executing: "/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/SAPCAR" -xvf "./SHADBMETRICSDEF.SAR" -R "/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/config.d"
SAPCAR: processing archive ./SHADBMETRICSDEF.SAR (version 2.01)
x dbmetric.definition.db4.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.db6.cimobj
x dbmetric.definition.hdb.cimobj

x dbmetrics.d
x dbmetrics.d/00.general.hdb.cimobj

x dbmetrics.d/10.host.capacity.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d/20.indexserver.hdb.cimobj
x dbmetrics.d/20.nameserver.hdb.cimobj
SAPCAR: 15 file(s) extracted
SAPCAR: rc 0
=>sapparam(1c): No Profile used.
=>sapparam: SAPSYSTEMNAME neither in Profile nor in Commandline
################################################
Abort execution because of
Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException
################################################

Error code: 20
++++ Support data section BEGIN ++++

/dev/sda on / type ext4 (rw,relatime)
devtmpfs on /dev type devtmpfs (rw,nosuid,size=4096k,nr_inodes=1013370,mode=755,inode64)

securityfs on /sys/kernel/security type securityfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)

pstore on /sys/fs/pstore type pstore (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
bpf on /sys/fs/bpf type bpf (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime,mode=700)
proc on /proc type proc (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
tmpfs on /run type tmpfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,size=1627428k,nr_inodes=819200,mode=755,inode64)
systemd-1 on /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc type autofs (rw,relatime,fd=32,pgrp=1,timeout=0,minproto=5,maxproto=5,direct,pipe_ino=14210)
mqueue on /dev/mqueue type mqueue (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
hugetlbfs on /dev/hugepages type hugetlbfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,pagesize=2M)
debugfs on /sys/kernel/debug type debugfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
tracefs on /sys/kernel/tracing type tracefs (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
fusectl on /sys/fs/fuse/connections type fusectl (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
configfs on /sys/kernel/config type configfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
tmpfs on /run/credentials/systemd-tmpfiles-setup-dev-early.service type tmpfs (ro,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime,nosymfollow,size=1024k,nr_inodes=1024,mode=700,inode64,noswap)

tmpfs on /run/credentials/systemd-tmpfiles-setup.service type tmpfs (ro,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime,nosymfollow,size=1024k,nr_inodes=1024,mode=700,inode64,noswap)
binfmt_misc on /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc type binfmt_misc (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
ABAP_RAR_Sources on /media/sf_ABAP_RAR_Sources type vboxsf (rw,nodev,relatime,iocharset=utf8,uid=0,gid=464,dmode=0770,fmode=0770,tag=VBoxAutomounter)
tmpfs on /run/user/1000 type tmpfs (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,size=813712k,nr_inodes=203428,mode=700,uid=1000,gid=100,inode64)
gvfsd-fuse on /run/user/1000/gvfs type fuse.gvfsd-fuse (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,user_id=1000,group_id=100)
portal on /run/user/1000/doc type fuse.portal (rw,nosuid,nodev,relatime,user_id=1000,group_id=100)
tmpfs on /run/credentials/getty@tty1.service type tmpfs (ro,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime,nosymfollow,size=1024k,nr_inodes=1024,mode=700,inode64,noswap)
tracefs on /sys/kernel/debug/tracing type tracefs (rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,relatime)
/dev/sr0 on /run/media/vhcalnplci/VBox_GAs_7.0.20 type iso9660 (ro,nosuid,nodev,relatime,nojoliet,check=s,map=n,blocksize=2048,uid=1000,gid=100,dmode=500,fmode=400,iocharset=utf8,uhelper=udisks2)

Please see readme.html to find out how to get help

entry.title: Scheduling background job through ABAP program which us dependent on first job completion
entry.content:
Requirement goes as 3 dependent jobs should run one after another only after the previous job is finished and I want to add them as steps in one job and execute it through an ABAP report.

How can this be achieve? how many JOB_CLOSE and JOB_SUBMIT FMs will be required and in what ordered?

Tried the below approach

For a chain of 3 jobs:

  1. Create job 1 but don't call JOB_CLOSE
  2. Create job 2 with preceding job = job 1
  3. Create job 3 with preceding job = job 2
  4. Define the start condition of job 1 = call JOB_CLOSE
    Note: JOB_CLOSE with start condition = preceding job Job1 (parameters PRED_JOBCOUNT and PRED_JOBNAME)

    Whatever I am doing is not working and leaving all 3 jobs in Scheduled status and not released one after another one the previous Job is completed.

    Also, I already went through documentation couldn't find any proper example that support my requirement. Help me if you have any idea regarding the same.

entry.title: Unable to Download License file for SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently trying to set up SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04, but I'm facing an issue with downloading the license file. Specifically, I am unable to download the file named "SAP ABAP AS Part License", which is required to complete the installation process.
Each time I try to access the license file, the download either fails. I've checked multiple browsers and internet connections, but the issue persists.

Is anyone else experiencing the same problem, or is there an alternative link or solution to obtain the license file?
